faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are attracted to Tompkinsville's older homes and buildings with numerous cracks and crevices that provide easy entry points. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to green spaces also attract these pests, especially in fall when they seek warm indoor spaces to overwinter.
